use_cases: Hero section headline with animated character-by-character text reveal on scroll
Landing page welcome message with typewriter typing effect
Loading or status messages with typing animation
Product feature callouts with progressive text reveal
Interactive storytelling sections with sequential character display
ai_summary: A typewriter text animation component that reveals text character by character when scrolled into view using Framer Motion, featuring a blinking cursor effect and configurable word-level styling for creating engaging text reveal animations.
